[Description](#tab-description-4056)

**IK Multi TR 1 360 Spray Bottle and Spray Top | 35oz *360 Degree***

**The latest version of the Multi TR 1 with 360 system to spray in all positions including upside down spraying.**

The bottle sprayer IK MULTI TR 360 offers a professional spraying solution for optimum results in a wide range of sectors such as cleaning and disinfection, automotive and vehicle detailing, bike cleaning, virus, pest and epidemic control, DIY or industrial applications and air conditioning (HVAC).

This sprayer is ideal for isolated works on small surfaces

**Technical information**
Useful capacity 1l. - 35 Oz
Total capacity 1l. - 35 Oz
Gross weight 0,18 Kg / 0,39 lbs
Net weight 0,18 Kg / 0,39 lbs
